rationale: The ongoing US-Iran deal uncertainty keeps EU energy prices indirectly elevated for Portugal; no Iberian-specific events this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal prolongs oil price uncertainty, which indirectly affects Portugal's energy bills and cost of living through EU energy markets.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Falling gold prices reflect shifting global financial sentiment; minor indirect relevance to Portuguese savings and investment environment.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars
top_events.summary: Financial milestone with negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life; background market noise.
